critique: Step 1 is incorrect. The function f_select_column is meant to retain only the columns relevant to the question (e.g., opponent and date). Using f_select_column(*) keeps all columns and fails to narrow the table to the necessary fields, misapplying the function’s purpose. A proper approach would first select the relevant columns, then filter rows where opponent contains "49ers" to identify the first date.
